short_blurb: Coastal roofing — salt-air resistant systems for Santa Monica.
local_note: Santa Monica's coastal location means salt air accelerates corrosion on standard galvanized fasteners, flashing, and gutters. We use stainless steel or aluminum fasteners and high-grade flashing on all coastal installs. Title 24 cool-roof requirements are strictly enforced by Santa Monica building officials — every assembly we install meets or exceeds requirements.
